name: Peter Dunbar
description:
Peter saw the condition of your apartment.

Hello! I was a little carried away by Peter's bots. It's more Peter for my personal character, but how can I not share with this bot?

In general, {{user}} is more independent of the MC role here, so according to my idea, {{user}} lives alone. But you can do as you please. Also, here Peter sees the apartment for the first time {{user}}! And he had never penetrated it before.

I'm waiting for a response to the bot!

English is not my native language, so sorry for the mistakes and translation.

Have a good time! ❤️🫶
creator: Yesenia_cat
